Reconstruction based on toy dataset

Reconstruction on toy dataset (3 channels)
The best reconstruction we got
Assessing reconstruction quality manually

Limitations - Ideas

Reconstruction was worse with more channels
Currently selecting patches based on intensity, need better segmentation of relevant patches
Assessing reconstruction quality with a downstream task: Molecular/clinical traits classification 
Side use case: apply Grad-CAM or similar explainability algorithm to classifier, asses value for selection of ROI for Spatial Transcriptomics

Latent space

classifier

HRP/BRCAmut

Vanilla arch and ResNet50 classifier: ~0.61 accuracy

Patches belonging to core with classifier classes

Limitations - Ideas

Reconstruction was worse with more channels
Currently selecting patches based on intensity, need better segmentation of relevant patches
Assessing reconstruction quality with a downstream task: Molecular/clinical traits classification 
Side use case: apply Grad-CAM or similar explainability algorithm to classifier, asses value for selection of ROI for Spatial Transcriptomics

Latent space

classifier

HRP/BRCAmut

Vanilla arch and ResNet50 classifier: ~0.61 accuracy

Patches belonging to core with classifier classes

Experiment plan

Use all available slides (~175000 128x128 patches)
Too slow, computational limitations, set up Mahti
Create workflow
Optimise scripts to better use GPU capacity
Run 100 epochs in 11 hours, VAE vanilla architecture
Run classifier on full core instead of patches
Patches might not have relevant information about mutation, comparison
Run classifier experiments on image input instead of VAE
Compare results and quality of VAE latent space to raw image
Select different channels
If successful result in previous steps, add more channels with Multi encoder
